name: Nippon Koei Co., Ltd.
summary: Nippon Koei Co., Ltd. provides engineering consulting and electric power engineering services in Japan and internationally. Its Domestic Consulting Operations segment offers site surveying, planning, evaluation/assessment, designing, construction management, and operational advisory services in the fields of water resources development, energy development, agricultural development, transportation, urban and regional development, management of natural and social environment, etc. The company's International Consulting Operations segment provides technical studies, planning, reviews, designing, construction supervision, operational advisory services in the fields of water resources development, energy development, agricultural development, transportation, urban and regional development, social development, management of natural and social environment, etc. Its Power Engineering Operations segment manufactures and sells control devices and systems for power generating and transforming stations, water turbines, power generators, voltage converters, electric power related equipment. This segment also engages in designing and implementation of various construction works for electric power and general electric facilities, including construction for power generation/transformation/transmission/distribution and civil engineering. The company's Urban & Spatial Development Operations segment is involved in the urban and spatial development business that includes urban planning and architectural design. Its Energy Business Operations segment engages in the research, development, design, construction, management, operation, support, and system/technology development of power generation/energy management operations utilizing distributed energy resources. The company's Real Estate Leasing Operations segment leases real estate properties in Japan. Nippon Koei Co., Ltd. was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
